description_long: This is a large, robust African elephant with a thick, wrinkled gray hide and prominent tusks curving downward from its upper jaw. Its massive head features large, fan-shaped ears and a long, flexible trunk extending toward the ground. The body is barrel-shaped, supported by four sturdy, pillar-like legs ending in broad, rounded feet. The skin texture is rough and deeply creased, especially around the shoulders, flanks, and legs, with subtle variations in shading and color. The tail is relatively short and tapers to a tuft of coarse hair. Overall, the animal exudes a sense of strength and presence, typical of an adult African elephant in the wild.
description: A large, gray African elephant with wrinkled skin, long tusks, and a powerful, sturdy build.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the elephant, with its trunk and tusks clearly visible and one ear prominently displayed.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the broad head, large ears, and the alignment of the trunk and tusks.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, but with the other side of the body and ear visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the rounded hindquarters, short tail, and the backs of the legs.
